hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$file" in *terraform.tfstate*|*-secrets.yaml|*kubeconfig|*talosconfig) echo 'BLOCKED: Refusing to edit sensitive file'; exit 1;; esac
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.tf ]]; then tofu fmt "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi
file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.yaml || "$file" == *.yml ]]; then yamllint -c /Users/cerre/DevOps/.yamllint "$file" 2>&1 | head -20; fi
